flags.description: Master toggle. Off = every write path (create + update + lifecycle transitions) returns 503. Emergency-only — flips down when the tenant plane must freeze branch mutations mid-migration.

Off = `GeocodeAddressJob` no-ops immediately + `/branches/{branch}/geocode` returns 503. Used during subprocessor outages (Google Maps rate-limit incident, Mapbox billing suspension) so the queue doesn't back up on failing calls.
Off = `POST /branches/{branch}/close` returns 503. Used during a legal-hold window where closing a Branch would destroy referenced-by evidence.
Off = `POST /branches/{branch}/reopen` returns 503. Used sparingly — rare use case.

Off = `branch.enforce_operating_hours` middleware bypasses (always permits). Used when the tenant needs to force a booking through outside the venue's normal hours (e.g. rescheduling after a public holiday change).

Off = the `saving (status → closed)` dependency check bypasses. Used only by platform support during compliance-forced closures (`POST /platform/branches/{branch}/force-close`). Dangerous — leaves orphaned downstream rows referencing a closed branch. Fires an alert every time it's tripped.
Off = `ReconcileDefaultBranchInvariantJob` no-ops. Used during large data-migration windows where the invariant is temporarily violated by design.
Off = the map-view SDUI screen returns an empty state instead of hitting the tile subprocessor. Used during Mapbox / OpenStreetMap tile outages.
